mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_fail_reason_config (id, name, pos, organization_id, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{config.id}, #{config.name}, #{config.pos}, #{config.organizationId}, #{config.createTime}, #{config.updateTime}, #{config.createUser}, #{config.updateUser})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM customer_fail_reason_config WHERE id = #{id} AND organization_id = #{orgId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM customer_fail_reason_config WHERE id = #{id} AND organization_id = #{orgId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_follow_way_config (id, name, pos, organization_id, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{config.id}, #{config.name}, #{config.pos}, #{config.organizationId}, #{config.createTime}, #{config.updateTime}, #{config.createUser}, #{config.updateUser})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM customer_follow_way_config WHERE id = #{id} AND organization_id = #{orgId}
